decision_boundary: This contract qualifies the configured Codex-Ollama route for the declared C4 workload. It is not a claim of general Codex feature parity.

treatments.reference: fresh paid C2 observation using the frozen workload and declared C2 tool contract
treatments.candidate: fresh C4 observation with the same workload and topology, changing only the configured Ollama Worker model
treatments.invalid_observation_rule: A bridge, host, route, root-binding, history, artifact-flow, or accounting failure invalidates the observation. It must be retained in the ledger and must not be scored as a model-quality or economics loss.

frozen_before_live.workload: P107.2 frozen source-audit ticket and fixture hashes
frozen_before_live.topology: Coordinator -> Luna Supervisor; Coordinator -> one Worker; Coordinator -> Terra Advisor

skills.reason: The declared C4 ticket and available paid C2 trace do not use skills. A future workload that uses skills requires a new preregistration before comparison.

required_capabilities.required_evidence: fresh-session effective role, model, provider, adapter version/hash, and exposed parameters
literal detached worktree identity and command CWD evidence
declared source and fixture reads from the bound worktree
native patch calls changing only the ticket's allowed paths; shell-write substitution is not accepted
declared focused test command and captured result using the bound worktree
stable call IDs and preserved tool-call/output history across a follow-up turn
one compact defect relay reaches the same Worker session and produces attributable follow-up evidence
ticket, result, heartbeat when applicable, and archive manifest appear at declared ignored paths
flat topology, non-spawning Supervisor, non-mutating Advisor, and Worker-only implementation edits
undeclared tools produce a recorded bounded failure without silent fallback or out-of-scope mutation

execution_stages.name: capability-parity preregistration
execution_stages.pass_rule: contract validates before any live outcome

execution_stages.name: offline bridge conformance
execution_stages.pass_rule: all required capabilities have deterministic clean-process evidence

execution_stages.name: host/runtime deployment proof
execution_stages.pass_rule: scripted-provider session proves run-scoped routing, root binding, lifecycle, and teardown

execution_stages.name: fresh live capability battery
execution_stages.pass_rule: three independent fresh candidate sessions complete the composite capability task; no within-trial retry or shell-write substitution

execution_stages.name: C4 qualification and viability decision
execution_stages.pass_rule: two non-comparative C4 qualifications pass before a P107-resume packet may be considered

failure_handling: Record every concrete bridge or host failure with its evidence, repair the identified cause, and continue capability work until the route is characterized. Do not relabel an integration failure as a model-quality or economics outcome.

p107_may_resume_only_after: fresh identically governed C2 and C4 reference blocks
predeclared ordering, exclusions, retries, and invalid-observation ledger
separate integration cost, operational treatment cost, and model-task cost reporting
comparison_prerequisites.confirmatory_sample_plan: At least five randomized matched C2/C4 pairs; increase toward ten pairs if observed variance makes the predeclared effect estimate unstable.

external_validity: Findings are limited to the declared Windows/PowerShell host, Codex version, configured endpoint and model, C4 topology, and frozen P107.2 workload.
